error_signature: hyperlink not working in Gmail send node
title: Hyperlinks not clickable in Gmail send node
symptom: When sending an email using the Gmail node with HTML content, hyperlinks appear as raw URLs instead of clickable links.
applies_when: Email Type is set to HTML
not_this_if: Hyperlinks are hardcoded in the HTML
root_cause: The Gmail node requires that hyperlinks have fixed text associated with them. If both the hyperlink text and URL are dynamically generated through expressions, the node does not render them as clickable links.
fix_steps: Modify the email body to include fixed text for hyperlinks.
Ensure that the URL is still dynamically generated if needed.
agent_instruction: Add fixed text to your hyperlinks in the email body to ensure they are clickable.
